reflection:
Three out of the last four mornings you've been up at five or just before. Yesterday it was the strong heartbeat, hot, eyes itching from timothy grass starting up. That part is real, it's seasonal, your body is reading the air. So don't sit there at 4am and turn that into a story about being broken. It isn't.

The sleep that followed last night actually held. WHOOP came back at 78 recovery, efficiency 89, HRV up to 36. Body coped. That matters.

What I want to push on is the speech. You called yourself lazy in the worry dump for not writing it. That isn't lazy, that's avoidance, and you already know the difference. The 'tetanus' thing and the 'playing two fields' question were both in there too, swirling. None of those three get resolved by a 4am cardio session in your chest. They get resolved one at a time, in daylight, with a pen.

Grass allergy is starting, dyshidrotic still at 2, slight feverish feel. Keep the throat soda rinses going, keep loading water and protein early, keep Enterosgel handy if the histamine load climbs.

Mood evening went up to 7 after padel with Dan. That's the lever, you know it.
opener: 5am again, grass allergy starting, but recovery actually held at 78
focus_for_today: Write the speech first, before email, before anything. One hour, then breathe.
